case_title: UCC INCORPORATED VS. HOWARD STONE et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-16-2012 AT 2:00PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST WILLIAM T. MCNULTY, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-12-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-28-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-12-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
